steps.title: Substitute the solved equation
steps.content: The first equation already gives $y=3x+9$. Substitute into $3y=8x-6$: $$3(3x+9)=8x-6.$$

steps.title: Compute the requested expression
steps.content: $$x-y=-33-(-90)=57.$$ Choice D, $57$, is correct. Choice A, $-123$, is the value of $x+y$; choice B, $-33$, is just $x$; and choice C, $3$, does not match the requested expression.
